message.content: @startuml actor SalesClerk participant ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI as UI control ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController as Controller entity "ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService" as Service1 #90EEFF database OrderRepository as Repo boundary "ChangeToBeingDeliveredService\n(External System)" as ExternalSystem == Update Dispatched Orders == SalesClerk -> UI : 1 Update the status of dispatched orders to \"Being delivered\" for customer delivery.\n activate UI UI ->> Controller : 2 orderDispatched() activate Controller Controller --> Service1 : 3 orderDispatched()\n activate Service1 Service1 ->> Repo : 4 orderDispatched()\n activate Repo Repo -->> Service1 : \n5 ordersDispatched deactivate Repo deactivate Service1 return "\n6 Shows all the orders that are dispatched." deactivate Controller loop Select an Order note over SalesClerk, UI: User selects one specific order from list end loop note right of SalesClerk: **7 Asks**\nto choose one of the orders return "**8 Selects**\nthe order he wants to change status"\n == Process Status Change Request == group Processing Selected Order participant ":SelectedOrderItem" as Item hidden UI -x Controller : 9 changeToBeing\nDeliver(order) group Internal Logic Flow alt Valid Selection? else Invalid Input end if rect rgb(240, 248, 255) opt Check Business Rules item = new("NewlyCreatedObject")#LightGreen create "**Critical Failure Point:**\nDatabase Connection Lost" as DBFail end opt hline black box "Core Domain Layer" LightGray/Black control CoreLogicHandler entity DataValidator endbox controller -> corelogichandler : Validate(orderID)\n[Timeout Exception] par Parallel Execution Block A & B service1 -> external_system : SyncDataPush(payload)\n[Latency > 50ms] and repo <- data_validator : QueryResult(status='PENDING') endpar destroy dbfail endrect end group Control <-- ui : Return Result Object {id: null} Note left of salesclerk:User sees error message:"Operation Failed due to system timeout."\nThe transaction was rolled back automatically by framework. @enduml
